deferred.reason: No patched version published in advisory; local-only torch.jit.script memory-corruption issue. Direct/transitive runtime dependency via openai-whisper and server NeMo/CUDA stack.

Server CUDA torch 2.9.1+cu129 still flagged by OSV; advisory points to an upstream commit but no PyPI/CUDA fixed release line available from scanner. Defer until PyTorch/NeMo-compatible patched wheel is available.
Server CUDA torch 2.9.1+cu129 flagged for local pt2 loading deserialization issue; no fixed version available in OSV/scanner output. Defer until compatible patched wheel is available.

thinning_candidates.reason: Main TUI pulls in torch for local transcription; keep for now because local transcription is core functionality, but revisit if Parakeet/server path replaces Whisper.
Server ASR stack brings a large CUDA dependency graph; keep while Parakeet streaming server is active, but isolate from main TUI environment.

notes: 2026-06-11: First baseline. Main uv export audited with pip-audit: 1 torch finding (CVE-2025-3000/GHSA-rrmf-rvhw-rf47), no fix version. Server pip-audit blocked by VCS nemo-toolkit hash handling, so server lock was audited via OSV batch (196 packages). Server aiohttp 3.13.5->3.14.1 clears GHSA-hg6j-4rv6-33pg and GHSA-jg22-mg44-37j8. Server re-audit now reports only torch advisories.
